UpdateSourceArgs: -c "cd \"{{$FullRootDir}}\"; mkdir -p \"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/compatdata\" \"{{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/steam\" \"{{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk32\" \"{{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk64\" \"{{$FullBaseDir}}.config/protonfixes\" && \cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so\" \"{{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk32/\" && \cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so\" \"{{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk64/\"; ProtonVersion=$(wget -qO- https://api.github.com/repos/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/latest | sed -n 's/.*\"tag_name\": \"\(GE-Proton[0-9]*-[0-9]*\)\".*/\1/p' | head -1); if [[ ! \"$ProtonVersion\" =~ ^GE-Proton[0-9]+-[0-9]+$ ]]; then echo \"Failed to retrieve a valid Proton GE release version from GitHub\" && exit 1; fi; if [[ -x \"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/proton\" && -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/version\" ]]; then read _ InstalledVersion < \"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/version\"; else InstalledVersion=\"\"; fi; if [[ \"$InstalledVersion\" == \"$ProtonVersion\"* ]]; then echo \"Proton GE version $ProtonVersion already installed. Skipping\" && exit 0; else [[ -f GE-Proton.tar.gz ]] && rm -f GE-Proton.tar.gz >/dev/null 2>&1; wget -qO GE-Proton.tar.gz https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/download/$ProtonVersion/$ProtonVersion.tar.gz || { echo \"Proton GE download failed from GitHub. Aborting\"; exit 1; }; rm -rf \"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/compatdata/\"* >/dev/null 2>&1; tar -xzf GE-Proton.tar.gz -C \"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton\" --strip-components=1 && rm -f GE-Proton.tar.gz >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo \"Proton GE version $ProtonVersion downloaded\" && { STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/compatdata\" STEAM_COMPAT_CLIENT_INSTALL_PATH=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/steam\" \"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/proton\" run wineboot >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0; }; fi"

-c "cd \"{{$FullRootDir}}\" && export PATH=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/files/bin:$PATH\"; export WINEPREFIX=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton/compatdata/pfx\"; export WINEARCH=win64; export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp; ./.proton/protonfixes/winetricks sound=disabled > winescript_log.txt 2>&1"
